description_long: This is a medium-sized deciduous tree with a slender, upright trunk and a moderately dense canopy of green, broad leaves. The trunk is straight and grayish-brown, with a subtle texture that suggests mature bark. The branches extend outward and upward in an alternate pattern, giving the tree a natural, asymmetrical silhouette. The foliage is composed of simple, broad leaves that are distributed unevenly, allowing some light to pass through the canopy. The tree appears healthy and well-suited for urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or residential streets. No roots are visible above ground, and the base of the trunk is clean and unobstructed.
description: A medium-sized deciduous tree with a slender trunk and a moderately dense canopy of broad green leaves, ideal for urban landscapes.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full height of the tree, with a straight trunk and a rounded, leafy canopy.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the asymmetrical spread of branches and the moderate density of the foliage.
description_view_2: Another angled view reveals more of the trunk and the uneven distribution of leaves, with some gaps in the canopy.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the vertical structure of the trunk and the open spaces between branches and leaves.
